title: rubus peguericus
intro: Rubus peguericus, also known as the Pegu raspberry, is a species of bramble or thorny shrub native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus peguericus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus peguericus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
